mapper.select: SELECT TB1.ULHSKEY ,TB1.CTKEY ,TB1.OWKEY ,TB1.ICKEY ,TB1.LCKEY ,TB1.ULCKEY ,TB1.QTY ,TB1.ICUTKEY ,TB1.UOM ,TB1.PRODUCTDATE ,TB1.EXPIREDATE ,TB1.IBCONFIRMDATE ,TB1.ATTRIBUTE1 ,TB1.ATTRIBUTE2 ,TB1.ATTRIBUTE3 ,TB1.ATTRIBUTE4 ,TB1.ATTRIBUTE5 ,TB1.PRODUCTLOT ,TB1.IFSTATUS ,TB1.IFMESSAGE ,TB1.INSERTDATE ,TB1.INSERTURKEY ,TB1.SEQ ,TB2.LOGGRPCD FROM TWORK_TEMP_IVUP TB1 LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_IC TB2 ON TB1.CTKEY = TB2.CTKEY AND TB1.OWKEY = TB2.OWKEY AND TB1.ICKEY = TB2.ICKEY WHERE TB1.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND TB1.ULHSKEY = #{ulhskey} ORDER BY TB1.ICKEY ASC, TB1.LCKEY ASC, TB1.ULCKEY

SELECT ULHSKEY ,CTKEY AS CTKEY_DESC ,OWKEY ,ICKEY ,LCKEY ,ULCKEY ,QTY ,ICUTKEY ,UOM AS UOM_DESC ,PRODUCTDATE ,EXPIREDATE ,IBCONFIRMDATE ,ATTRIBUTE1 ,ATTRIBUTE2 ,ATTRIBUTE3 ,ATTRIBUTE4 ,ATTRIBUTE5 ,PRODUCTLOT ,IFMESSAGE ,#{ctkey} || ';' || 'IFSTATUS'||';'||IFSTATUS AS IFSTATUS_DESC ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY FROM TWORK_TEMP_IVUP WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey}
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
